en: Once you cheated, I chose to forget. Aah!
ko: 한 번 속였으니, 잊기로 했어. 아아!

en: Well, we also have this LG model.
It's 50% off.
And when it's done, you'll hear this.
ko: 다 끝나면 이 소리를 들을 수 있어요.

en: Ooh, half off. That's great.
Yeah, but it doesn't have that jingle. I really like that.
ko: 네, 하지만 그 징글은 없어요. 그게 정말 마음에 들어요.

en: Well, if it's a jingle you crave,
I do have this special washer-dryer duo.
Now, I don't show these to just anyone.
Your clothes are done, your clothes are done.
ko: 당신의 옷이 다 됐어요, 옷이 다 됐어요.

en: I wait a minute, wash them, and your clothes are done.
ko: 1분 기다렸다가 세탁하고, 당신의 옷이 다 됐어요.

en: I'm the washer. Doo-doo.
I'm the dryer. Doo-doo.
We washed all your clothes, got the stains dried out,
ko: 당신의 모든 옷을 세탁하고, 얼룩도 제거했어요,

en: and they're almost totally dry. Okay. Whoa.
ko: 거의 완전히 마른 상태예요. 좋아요. 와우.

en: I really like that.
Kind of a swinging 20s vibe. Very fun.
Yeah, I don't know.
At the end, they said the clothes will be all dry.
ko: 마지막에 그들은 옷이 다 마른다고 했어요.

en: They said the clothes will be almost totally dry.
ko: 그들은 옷이 거의 완전히 마른다고 했어요.

en: That seems bad.
